text: This is the story of a man who fell forever.
He has been falling longer than the light remembers.
No ground below, no sky above — only the fall.
Every star you see is someone who once passed through here.
He fell past empires of fire and seas of frozen dust.
Time bends here, but the falling never ends.
Somewhere behind him, a world he can no longer name.
He is not lost. He is simply still falling.
The universe is vast, and he is small, and still he falls.
If you are watching, you are falling with him.
He stopped counting the days. The days did not stop.
Galaxies drift by like ships that never answer.
He fell through the silence until the silence became a song.
Light-years pass. He does not age. He only falls.
This is not a beginning, and it will not end.
He carries no map, for there is nowhere to arrive.
